CustomField.formula: FIND( IF( AND(FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name , FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name ) +1 ) > 0, FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name ,FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name , FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name ) +1 ) +1) > 0) , LEFT( $UserRole.Name , FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name ,FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name , FIND(' ', $UserRole.Name ) +1 ) +1) -1) , $UserRole.Name) ,Owner:User.UserRole.Name) > 0
CustomField.label: 自身の部門(リスト用)
